description.overview: Akitas are large, powerful dogs from Japan known for their dignity and fierce loyalty. They're symbols of good health, happiness, and long life in Japan.
description.temperament: Akitas are loyal and protective, devoted to family but wary of strangers. They can be aggressive toward other dogs, especially same sex.
description.health: Prone to hip dysplasia, autoimmune disorders, and bloat. Regular vet checkups important.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs. Daily activity required. Mental stimulation important.

best_for: People who can provide firm leadership
verdict.summary: Dignified, fiercely loyal protectors best for experienced owners. Akitas are devoted to family but wary of strangers and may be aggressive with other dogs. Need confident leadership and early socialization.
